data.title: GameStop rose more than 8% at the opening of the U.S. stock market, while Coinbase fell 3.67%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. stocks opened, the Dow opened flat, the S&P 500 rose 0.05%, and the Nasdaq rose 0.06%. GameStop rose more than 8%, and it was reported that it was considering investing in Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. Coinbase fell 3.67%.

data.title: Torrent Capital has increased its holdings by 4,955 SOL since the beginning of January
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Torrent Capital Ltd. announced that it has purchased an additional 4,955 Solana (SOL) tokens since announcing the creation of a cryptocurrency portfolio and its first purchase of SOL on January 6, 2025. As of February 10, 2025, Torrent holds a total of 6,955 SOL. (Chainwire)

data.title: Broccoli's largest holder increased his holdings by $210,000 after CZ's post mentioned the deletion of the post
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, after the "CZ posting and deleting the post", the market value of Broccoli tokens ending in 714 fell from 300 million to 137 million US dollars. The "big brother on the list" did not sell, and even increased his position. Three hours ago, the price of the coin fell rapidly after CZ deleted the post. The whale added 210,000 US dollars at the position of 0.17 US dollars; currently holding 4.07% of the chips, the cost is 0.1281 US dollars, and the floating profit has narrowed to 471,000 US dollars (the peak market value is as high as 8.28 million US dollars).

data.title: Grayscale transfers 1,421 ETH to Coinbase Prime hot wallet address
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring, about 7 minutes ago, Grayscale transferred 1,421 ETH worth 3.84 million US dollars to the Coinbase Prime hot wallet address through its Coinbase Prime Deposit address.

data.title: TRUMP rose above 20 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 24.14%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market shows that TRUMP has risen above 20 USDT and is now at 20.32 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 24.14%.
Previous news: Upbit launched TRUMP Korean Won, BTC, and USDT trading pairs.

data.title: Grayscale transfers 690 BTC to an unmarked address, worth $66.76 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Arkham monitoring, about 2 minutes ago, the Grayscale Bitcoin ETF transferred 690 BTC worth 66.76 million US dollars to an unmarked address.

data.title: Juventus fan token JUV hits $2.78, up 165.8% in 24 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the market, Juventus fan token JUV hit $2.78, a 24-hour increase of 165.8%. 
Earlier, Tether announced a strategic acquisition of a minority stake in Juventus Club, aiming to promote Tether's future investment portfolio into the sports industry.

data.title: LBank will launch FAIR3 U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank will launch FAIR3 U-based perpetual contracts at 22:30 (SGT) on February 14, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation: Pectra network upgrade plan launched on Ethereum testnet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The official blog of the Ethereum Foundation announced that the Pectra network upgrade plan will be launched on the Ethereum test network. It will be launched on Holesky at epoch 115968 (05:55 Beijing time on February 25), and then on Sepolia at epoch 222464 (15:29 Beijing time on March 5). The Pectra test network client version is listed below. After the two test networks are successfully upgraded, a main network will be selected to activate the epoch. Pectra was launched after last year's Dencun upgrade. It introduces more features such as enhanced Ethereum accounts, improved validator experience, and support for L2 expansion.

data.title: Dubai's VARA Issues Warning on Meme Coin Risks
data.description: According to Odaily, the Dubai Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority (VARA) has issued a warning regarding the risks associated with meme coins. The regulatory body advises investors to avoid speculative and unregulated assets, highlighting their speculative nature, volatility, and susceptibility to market manipulation. VARA urges caution when investors encounter promises of unrealistic returns, emphasizing that such promises often indicate fraudulent activities. Meme coins issued in Dubai are required to comply with the rules enforced by VARA.
